scripts.probe:build: npm run probe:build:win-x64 && npm run probe:build:mac-arm64 && npm run probe:build:mac-x64 && npm run probe:build:linux-x64 && npm run probe:build:linux-arm64
scripts.probe:build:win-x64: dotnet publish tools/DeepProbe/NetworkDeepProbe.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true --output artifacts/win-x64
scripts.probe:build:mac-arm64: dotnet publish tools/DeepProbe/NetworkDeepProbe.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 --self-contained true --output artifacts/osx-arm64
scripts.probe:build:mac-x64: dotnet publish tools/DeepProbe/NetworkDeepProbe.csproj -c Release -r osx-x64 --self-contained true --output artifacts/osx-x64
scripts.probe:build:linux-x64: dotnet publish tools/DeepProbe/NetworkDeepProbe.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained true --output artifacts/linux-x64
scripts.probe:build:linux-arm64: dotnet publish tools/DeepProbe/NetworkDeepProbe.csproj -c Release -r linux-arm64 --self-contained true --output artifacts/linux-arm64
